text:
V0200A12B_NTRNT_CPL_CD V0200A12B Nutritional Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Nutritional Status care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
588 V0200A13A_FEEDG_TUBE_CTR_CD V0200A13A_FEEDG_TUBE_CTR_CD V0200A13A Feeding Tube Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Feeding Tube CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked
